name: journeyos
description: JourneyOS hackathon MVP - AI travel operating system

scripts.setup: npm install --cache .npm-cache && npm --prefix server install --cache .npm-cache && npm --prefix client install --cache .npm-cache
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
